reviews.comment: She gives tedious (50+ questions) homework, once you turn it in- don't expect it back before the exam to review, nor in time for the final or midterm grades. She doesn't grade any of her assigned homework. She will give you a BRIEF syllabus that will come back to bite you a month after class has begun. All she does is teach, hours are not helpful.
Good teacher, explains subjects in many ways if you don't understand.

College algebra with modeling. Hardest thing ever. Wish I wouldn't have been trained to only use a calculator for equations in High School. Trying to do math without a calculator was so hard for me. Made it to algebra 2 in HS

She means well but...she is highly boring and annoying. She makes easy concepts sound incredibly complicated, and take days and days to go over the same material. If a student needs help, she is there to help. But she'll take up 30 minutes on one students question instead of asking them to see her after class. I stayed pissed at stupid students.
Statistics is required for a poli-sci major and she helped me through the entire class.  If you are willing to put in the work, she is willing to help in any way that she can!!

She's the cute, cuddly teddy-bear type. Very friendly in class, great teaching. Puts in a lot of time and effort. Grades tough, extremely difficult tests. Malleable schedule. Difficult to reach after class. Tells good stories of her cat and first car in 1960s.

Beware Education majors...don't ask Judy for a recommendation letter for your portfolios because it won't recommend you for anything positive.  I don't know if she understands what a recommendation is suppose to help.  I'd have rather her say I don't have anything positive to say about you than to write the kinds of things she wrote.
I'll admit, she is a good teacher. But she grades oddly. I got every answer right on my final...but she have me a 78!
I also had Dr. Rector for MAT011.  Judy is the reason I graduated!  She is the best at what she does!  She takes the time to make sure you understand her!!  SHE IS THE BEST MATH TEACHER I EVER HAD!

If it were not for her great teaching, I would not be graduating. She made Pre-Calculus very understandable for many non-math students. Thank you! She is the professor for students who hate and/or are very bad in math.

I had Dr. Rector for an education class.  She is a wonderful math professor, but she needs a little work on the education aspect of it all.  I had her several years ago, and she did not incorporate any classroom experience into her course.
